title: Battle Round Personal Bottle Opener Stealth Key Chain
description:
Battle Opener Personal security weapon and bottle opener. This keychain is a stealth way to open beers or go into protection mode if your life is threatened. It's beefy design is after one of our favorite rounds, the .338 Lapua, but on stereroids. Made from aerospace grade aluminum and hard anodized, the Battle Opener is virtually indestructible, lightweight and a great security companion. The braided stainless steel key-chord locks and unlocks to add or remove your keys, or simply add your keychain hoop to it. Don't be caught off gaurd and fail to protect yourself or be unprepared at a BBQ

Battle Round Personal Bottle Opener Stealth Key Chain

Battle Opener Personal security weapon and bottle opener. This keychain is a stealth way to open beers or go into protection mode if your life is threatened. It's beefy design is after one of our favorite rounds, the .338 Lapua, but on stereroids. Made from aerospace grade aluminum and hard anodized, the Battle Opener is virtually indestructible, lightweight and a great security companion. The braided stainless steel key-chord locks and unlocks to add or remove your keys, or simply add your keychain hoop to it. Don't be caught off gaurd and fail to protect yourself or be unprepared at a BBQ.

Key Features

  • 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum
  • Black hard anodized
  • Length: 3.75" long
  • Dia: 5/8"

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BOBO1
  • UPC: 714268006833
  • Color: Black
  • Size: Small

Battle Opener Uses:

1) Open bottle caps 2) Pry can tabs open 3) Grip between fingers and use as self defense puncture tool 4) Hold in palm and use keys as whip device (tradition Kubaton style) 5) Looks super cool as a key chain!
